title: Green Thumb Industries Q3 2025 Revenue and Net Income Results
text: Green Thumb Industries reported Q3 2025 revenue of $291 million with net income of $23.3 million. This represented growth in the company's core operations, with performance driven by retail expansion and CPG segment growth. The company's focus on brand-led market share expansion delivered results, with meaningful third-quarter gains in key markets including Illinois, Pennsylvania, New Jersey and Maryland. Additionally, the company experienced strong market share gains in key states, including Illinois, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Florida and others. The company maintains its position as a leading national cannabis consumer packaged goods company and owner of RISE Dispensaries. Green Thumb has 20 manufacturing facilities and operates across 14 U.S. markets with a focus on quality products and customer experience. The strong performance in branded CPG products continues to offset some of the pricing pressures in the retail cannabis market.
